title: Tiger Wheel & Tyre rolls into Oudtshoorn with new store and grand opening specials
description: BUSINESS NEWS AND VIDEO - Tiger Wheel &...
bodyText:
[{"type":"paragraph","text":"Sponsored Content\n Video","html":"Sponsored Content\n Video"},{"type":"paragraph","text":"BUSINESS NEWS AND VIDEO - Tiger Wheel & Tyre is thrilled to announce the grand opening of its newest store in the heart of the Little Karoo.","html":"BUSINESS NEWS AND VIDEO - Tiger Wheel & Tyre is thrilled to announce the grand opening of its newest store in the heart of the Little Karoo."},{"type":"blockquote","text":"Conveniently located at Shop 1, 67 Voortrekker Road, this latest addition to the Tiger Wheel & Tyre family officially opens its doors on 3 November, bringing trusted products, expert service, and unbeatable value to the community."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"With three fitment bays and one alignment bay, the store is fully equipped to deliver the same standard of fast, friendly, and professional service that customers across the country have come to expect.","html":"With three fitment bays and one alignment bay, the store is fully equipped to deliver the same standard of fast, friendly, and professional service that customers across the country have come to expect."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"The store will be managed by Gordon Meyers, a seasoned professional who is passionate about quality service and customer care.","html":"The store will be managed by Gordon Meyers, a seasoned professional who is passionate about quality service and customer care."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"“As an award-winning brand, we’re proud to join the Oudtshoorn community and to become your go-to partner for all things tyres, wheels and batteries,” said Gordon Meyers.","html":"“As an award-winning brand, we’re proud to join the Oudtshoorn community and to become your go-to partner for all things tyres, wheels and batteries,” said Gordon Meyers."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"“With every journey, safety starts with the four tyres connecting you to the road,” says Meyers. “At Tiger Wheel & Tyre Oudtshoorn, we’re not just fitting tyres, we’re helping families, farmers and travellers stay safe, wherever the road leads.”","html":"“With every journey, safety starts with the four tyres connecting you to the road,” says Meyers. “At Tiger Wheel & Tyre Oudtshoorn, we’re not just fitting tyres, we’re helping families, farmers and travellers stay safe, wherever the road leads.”"},{"type":"heading","text":"To celebrate the grand opening, customers can look forward to exciting launch offers:","level":"h3"},{"type":"paragraph","text":"On 3 November, the first 50 customers get buy one, get one free on selected premium tyres.","html":"On 3 November, the first 50 customers get buy one, get one free on selected premium tyres."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"If you miss out on the buy one, get one free deal, customers can take advantage of a buy three, get one free offer on the same trusted tyre brands.","html":"If you miss out on the buy one, get one free deal, customers can take advantage of a buy three, get one free offer on the same trusted tyre brands."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"(T’s & C’s apply. While stocks last.)","html":"(T’s & C’s apply. While stocks last.)"},{"type":"heading","text":"At Tiger Wheel & Tyre Oudtshoorn, customers can shop from a premium range of:","level":"h3"},{"type":"list","items":["Tyres by Bridgestone, BFG, Continental, Goodyear, Hankook, Michelin, Velocity, and Yokohama","Wheels from TSW, Racing Hart Concepts, Black Rhino, and more","Automotive batteries from AtlasBX and Duracell"],"ordered":false},{"type":"paragraph","text":"The store also offers value-added services like wheel alignment, balancing, tyre repairs and nitrogen inflation, all delivered by expertly trained technicians.","html":"The store also offers value-added services like wheel alignment, balancing, tyre repairs and nitrogen inflation, all delivered by expertly trained technicians."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"For added convenience, flexible payment options, including Float, PayJustNow, and Xpress Credit, are available.","html":"For added convenience, flexible payment options, including Float, PayJustNow, and Xpress Credit, are available."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"For more information, visit www.twt.co.za or contact the Oudtshoorn store at 010 022 7230.Better yet, stop, say hello and let us be the place where all safe journeys begin.","html":"For more information, visit www.twt.co.za or contact the Oudtshoorn store at 010 022 7230.
Better yet, stop, say hello and let us be the place where all safe journeys begin."},{"type":"blockquote","text":"VIDEO - The Tiger Wheel & Tyre family in Oudtshoorn:"},{"type":"paragraph","text":"Your browser does not support HTML5 video.","html":""},{"type":"paragraph","text":"‘We bring you the latest Garden Route, Hessequa, Karoo news’","html":"‘We bring you the latest Garden Route, Hessequa, Karoo news’"}]

images.alt: Tiger Wheel & Tyre rolls into Oudtshoorn with new store and grand opening specials
